pr_text:
## Title: Fix uninitialized memory read in tracer config module

### Summary
Static variables in the tracer configuration module were implicitly initialized, causing static analyzers to flag potential uninitialized memory reads when `get_local_config()` is called before configuration is loaded. While static variables are zero-initialized by the C standard, explicit initialization ensures deterministic behavior, improves code clarity, and prevents downstream undefined behavior when these values a
